calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating settling falsifier -- SAME-LAYER null (frozen magnitude-matched random W_lat at the eligibility/settling field); brake-EXEMPT TERMINAL re-run, supersedes V3-EXQ-700b
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-700b_2026-06-24 (user-adjudicated CONCURRENT: V4 loop-segregation + this terminal V3 700c). Replaces 700b's policy-temperature ARM_NOISE (MECH-313 use_noise_floor -- decoupled from the committed-class DV by the F-bounded eligibility constitution; 3 runs of alpha-bumping FAILED) with a SAME-LAYER null = use_learned_settling_step=True + learned_settling_eta=0.0 + a frozen magnitude-matched random W_lat injected into agent.e3.W_lat (the within-eligible accumulator MECH-450 settling acts on), gated behind per-arm field_noise so A0/A2/A3/C3 are byte-identical to 700b. 5 arms (A0/A2_SETTLING_SIGNED/A3_BOTH_SIGNED/C3_SETTLING_UNSIGNED/ARM_NOISE) x 6 seeds, phased P0/P1/P2, landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion+adaptive_floor 689e+go_nogo 689g+modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 569i; use_differentiable_cem=False) as a MATCHED CONSTANT, per-seed-divergent gating, committed-action-class entropy DV. PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL: any further null failure (no verify-lift at the correct layer, or no conversion on a now-verified bar) auto-escalates to V4 loop-segregation -- NO further V3 letters. RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (user-adjudicated 2026-06-24: concurrent with V4 escalation, genuine null REDESIGN not an alpha-bump, pre-registered terminal); the brake REFUSES any alpha-bump same-lever requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-439,ARC-108,MECH-450]. ARM-REUSE: REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None (runs all arms fresh; set to the V3-EXQ-700c-m mint run_id to skip the 4 unchanged arms). PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling; ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.
items.machine_affinity_note: Pinned to ree-cloud-4 (user-directed 2026-06-24): 700b ran on ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10); arm-reuse fingerprint is machine-class-bound so the mint + consumer must share the worker.

items.title: EXP-0391 MECH-451 finer-channel-granularity validation falsifier -- A0_ENVELOPE_ONLY / A1_GLOBAL_WCHAN / A2_FINER_CHANNELS / ARM_NOISE; the cheap V3 rung BEFORE the V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation build (a PASS pre-empts it)
items.note: EXP-0391 (manual_proposals.v1.json) validation falsifier for the MECH-451 finer-channel-granularity substrate (BUILT + landed 2026-06-24: ree-v3 main a2af803, REE_assembly master 217bd4a). SIBLING of the V3-EXQ-700 lineage on the SAME GAP-A-ready reef-bipartite foraging substrate + the SAME landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor 689e + go_nogo 689g + modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 569i; SD-056-trained e2.world_forward + ARC-065 GAP-A candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward as the divergent-pool non-vacuity precondition) as a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms; settling W_lat OFF on ALL arms (use_learned_settling_step=False -- isolates channel granularity). The ONLY change across arms is the score_bias channel GRANULARITY feeding the ARC-108 learned-gating layer: A0_ENVELOPE_ONLY (no learned gating) / A1_GLOBAL_WCHAN (use_learned_channel_gating -- the single global w_chan over the compressed blend = the V3-EXQ-700 A1 reference AND the ARC-106 collapse-to-blend ablation) / A2_FINER_CHANNELS (use_finer_channel_gating, MECH-451 -- separately-learnable finer w_chan_finer per named channel, SAME ARC-108 signed-RPE three-factor rule) / ARM_NOISE (verified-lifting matched-noise control = a SAME-LAYER finer-gating null: use_finer_channel_gating + learned_channel_gating_eta=0.0 + a frozen magnitude-matched random w_chan_finer injected into agent.e3.w_chan_finer). 4 arms x 6 seeds, phased P0/P1/P2 (250 ep/cell), PRIMARY DV = committed-action-class entropy. claim_ids=[MECH-451] (re-evaluated from scratch; ARC-108/ARC-110/MECH-439 are context). experiment_purpose=evidence. PRE-REGISTERED decisive either way: A2 strict-above A0 AND A1 AND noise on >=1 previously-F-dominated non-motor function on a strict-majority of divergent seeds => REPRESENTATIONAL COMPRESSION confirmed -> supports MECH-451 + PRE-EMPTS the V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation build; A2 finer-weights-MOVE (fcg_w_chan_finer_range/_std > floor) but no lift beyond A1 => compression NOT the binding constraint -> POSITIVE evidence FOR ARC-110 (route to v4_loop_segregation), NOT against ARC-108, weakens the MECH-451 compression hypothesis. ARC-106 cargo-cult guard: A1 sits IN the C1 strict-above bar (if the single global w_chan reproduces the lift the finer decomposition is NOT load-bearing). NON-VACUITY self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens): (1) finer channels DISSOCIABLE (fcg_w_chan_finer_range > floor -- entries that move identically are the blend re-labelled); (2) pool DIVERGENT (GAP-A); (3) delta_t non-flat + finer weights moved; (4) the verified-lifting ARM_NOISE bar actually raises entropy above A0 (569g/700b lesson); (5) frozen-random w_chan_finer magnitude-matched to the A2 learned range (one-time re-tune knob FCG_NOISE_SCALE). ARM-REUSE: A0/A1/A2 emit reuse-ELIGIBLE per-cell fingerprints (MINT-AS-YOU-GO; include_driver_script_in_hash=False) so a future 704 sibling can reuse them; ARM_NOISE ineligible (frozen-random injection); REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None (runs all arms fresh -- safe, the false cache-miss is free). PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-451 candidate / substrate_conditional / v3). Gates: py_compile + ASCII-clean + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (per-cell arm_fingerprint; 0 readiness-warnings) + validate_queue OK + dry-run smoke exit 0 (substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy scale = correct non-vacuity self-route; no manifest leaked under evidence/). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.
